speaker: charlie
text: That's your ParkSyde Bright Side for Monday the 27th of April. From quantum breakthroughs to turtle comebacks, it's been a cracker of a day for good news.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely. Sometimes you need to step back and appreciate the incredible progress happening in science, environmental protection, and yes, even sport. The world's not all doom and gloom.

speaker: charlie
text: Thanks for joining us on this beautiful autumn day in southeast Queensland. Sam's forecast looks spot on - perfect weather to get outside and appreciate what we've got.

speaker: alice
text: We'll be back tomorrow with more stories that prove humanity's still capable of amazing things. Until then, keep looking for the bright side.

speaker: charlie
text: This is Alex Mercer and Jamie signing off from ParkSyde Bright Side. Have a ripper of a day, Queensland.
